data.title: WLFI token surges as Trump-backed World Liberty Financial announces plan to repurchase and burn tokens.
data.description: The WLFI token, associated with World Liberty Financial and supported by former President Trump, has seen a rise in value subsequent to the approval of a plan to repurchase and eliminate the token.

data.title: Space stocks have rebounded except RKLB, which dropped post $750M common stock offering. Rocket Lab had sold $396.6M before, replaced with new offering.
data.description: Stocks in the space sector have shown signs of recovery recently, except for one exception that saw a decline following a new common stock offering. Rocket Lab Corp. (NASDAQ: RKLB) witnessed a drop in its shares after announcing an offering of up to $750 million of its common stock. This move led to the termination of a previous agreement from March, which permitted the sale of up to $500 million of common stock. Prior to this new offering, the company had already sold $396.6 million of its common stock. Rocket Lab stock had been on the path to recovery until this recent development. For more information, refer to the full coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Regeneron reports 94% reduction in new bone lesions in rare genetic disorder trial.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. announced positive findings from its Phase 3 OPTIMA trial of garetosmab for adults with fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva (FOP), a rare genetic disorder causing tissues to turn into bone. The study's main goal was met, showing at 56 weeks, garetosmab at 3 mg/kg and 10 mg/kg lessened new bone lesions by 94% and 90% respectively, versus placebo. This condition leads to a "second skeleton" forming, restricting movement. More information can be found on a news website.

data.title: Roivant/Priovant's brepocitinib shows promise in dermatomyositis trial, demonstrating improvement on primary and secondary endpoints.
data.description: Roivant Sciences Ltd and Priovant Therapeutics announced findings from the Phase 3 VALOR trial investigating brepocitinib in dermatomyositis. Dermatomyositis is an autoimmune condition leading to muscle inflammation and a characteristic reddish or purple skin rash on the face, knuckles, and upper chest. The once-daily oral dose of brepocitinib 30 mg showed significant improvement versus placebo on the primary endpoint and all nine key secondary endpoints. These included skin and muscle disease measurements, steroid-sparing effect, and onset speed. Furthermore, Immunovant decided against pursuing FDA approval for Batoclimab for two autoimmune disorders post encouraging Phase 3 results. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sharjah hosts Inclusion International 18th World Congress 2025 'We Are Inclusion' with 600 participants from 74 countries.
data.description: Sharjah in the United Arab Emirates is set to be the location for the Inclusion International 18th World Congress in 2025, themed 'We Are Inclusion'. This event will mark the first time Sharjah hosts the congress, bringing together 600 participants from 74 different countries.

data.title: Bitcoin stalls near $116,000, forming cup-and-handle pattern; $118,000 key level, with bullish target at $120,000-$125,000.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading around $116,000 following a post-FOMC rally. Analysts are observing liquidity levels closely to predict its next move. Kevin, a notable analyst, mentioned that Bitcoin is forming a cup-and-handle pattern on the 4-hour chart, but momentum paused near $118,000, slightly below the crucial 0.786 Fibonacci level at $118,300. Weak spot volume and decreasing liquidity flows are contributing to sideways movement in the price. Kevin outlined a critical range of $106,000–$118,300. In the bullish scenario, a breakout above this range could lead to price targets of $120,000–$125,000, while in the bearish case, a breakdown could see prices fall to $104,000–$100,000. Liquidity heatmaps indicate short liquidity levels up to $119,000 and long liquidity centered around $106,000–$108,000 for Bitcoin.

data.title: Red Cat Holdings closes public stock offering, selling 17,968,750 shares for $172.5M, with underwriters purchasing 2,343,750 extra.
data.description: In San Juan, Puerto Rico on September 19, 2025, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT), a drone technology company catering to military, government, and commercial sectors, disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. This offering comprised 17,968,750 common stock shares, which encompassed the full utilization of the underwriters’ option to procure an additional 2,343,750 shares. The total gross proceeds generated for the company stood at around $172.5 million from this offering, excluding expenses related to underwriting discounts, commissions, and other offering costs.

data.title: DryEye Rescue introduces Rescue Link, allows eye care providers to text patients OTC recommendations in under 60 seconds.
data.description: A groundbreaking platform called Rescue Link has been introduced by DryEye Rescue in Boca Raton, Florida. This tool enables eye care providers to send personalized over-the-counter product recommendations to patients via text message in less than 60 seconds. This innovation aims to streamline the process of providing tailored advice to patients. The launch of Rescue Link signifies a leap forward in modernizing eye care services.
